ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason__c ,"Other") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason__c ,"Price") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_Options__c ,"Countries") || ISPICKVAL( Closed_Won_Reason_Options__c ,"Other")) && ISBLANK( Closed_Won_Reason_More_Details__c ) && $Profile.Name !="System Administrator" && $Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps" && NOT( ISCHANGED( Open_Activity_Count__c ) ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger" && RecordType.DeveloperName<> "Acquired_Company"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Closed Won Reason - More details are required.
